name: Pad Thai
method: Soak the rice noodles in a bowl of water for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet.
Brown the garlic, scallions, and chicken for 5 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the same skillet and crack the eggs into the skillet.
Scramble the eggs until they are firm, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the chili sauce, white wine vinegar, fish sauce, lime juice, peanut sauce, and sugar.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes.
Transfer the noodles into the skillet and toss well.
